mapper.sql: id, loginName, loginTime, loginIP, logoutTime, logoutIP, loginSuccess, logoutSuccess, userId
mapper.insert:
insert into t_user_login_record
id,
loginName,
loginTime,
loginIP,
logoutTime,
logoutIP,
loginSuccess,
logoutSuccess,
userId,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{loginName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{loginIP,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{logoutTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{logoutIP,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update t_user_login_record
loginName = #{loginName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
loginTime = #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
loginIP = #{loginIP,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
logoutTime = #{logoutTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
logoutIP = #{logoutIP,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
loginSuccess = #{loginSuccess,jdbcType=BIT},
logoutSuccess = #{logoutSuccess,jdbcType=BIT},
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_user_login_record set loginName = #{loginName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, loginTime = #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, loginIP = #{loginIP,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logoutTime = #{logoutTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, logoutIP = #{logoutIP,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, loginSuccess = #{loginSuccess,jdbcType=BIT}, logoutSuccess = #{logoutSuccess,jdbcType=BIT}, userId = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
